mapper.select: SELECT id, name, department_id, description, created_at FROM gw_boards ORDER BY id

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gw_posts p WHERE p.board_id = #{boardId}
AND (p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') OR p.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%'))

SELECT p.id, p.board_id, p.title, p.content, p.author_id, p.view_count, p.created_at, p.updated_at, u.name AS author_name, b.name AS board_name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gw_comments c WHERE c.post_id = p.id) AS comment_count FROM gw_posts p JOIN itsm_users u ON p.author_id = u.id JOIN gw_boards b ON p.board_id = b.id WHERE p.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO gw_posts (board_id, title, content, author_id) VALUES (#{boardId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{authorId})
mapper.update: UPDATE gw_posts SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE gw_posts SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.post_id, c.parent_id, c.author_id, c.content, c.created_at, c.updated_at, u.name AS author_name FROM gw_comments c JOIN itsm_users u ON c.author_id = u.id WHERE c.post_id = #{postId} ORDER BY c.created_at ASC
SELECT c.id, c.post_id, c.parent_id, c.author_id, c.content, c.created_at, c.updated_at, u.name AS author_name FROM gw_comments c JOIN itsm_users u ON c.author_id = u.id WHERE c.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO gw_comments (post_id, parent_id, author_id, content) VALUES (#{postId}, #{parentId}, #{authorId}, #{content})
